SEARCH
Package app.service.impl.anomalies

Class BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService

java.lang.Object
app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService
All Implemented Interfaces:
AnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
public class BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService extends BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
Concrete implementation of the BaseAnomaliesDetectionService specialized for processing raw sequential pricing data mapped to the DataRecord structure.

It maps records across 5 structural features: Open, High, Low, Close, and Volume.

    calculateMeans(List<DataRecord> data)
    Computes the mathematical mean values across all financial data dimensions from a collection of data records to form a centralized operational reference point.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService

      public BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService()

  • Method Details

    • parseData

      protected double[][] parseData(List<DataRecord> data)
      Transforms a generic collection list of financial domain record objects into a primitive 2D matrix structure format compatible with the underlying mathematical library matrices.

      Parses the 5 base OHLCV attributes (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) from DataRecord objects into a matrix.

      Specified by:
      parseData in class BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
      Parameters:
      data - The working List containing generic time-series instances.
      Returns:
      A primitive 2D double matrix tracking dimensional mapped values.

    • calculateMeans

      protected double[] calculateMeans(List<DataRecord> data)
      Computes the mathematical mean values across all financial data dimensions from a collection of data records to form a centralized operational reference point.

      Calculates the absolute mathematical averages for the 5 fundamental OHLCV dimensions.

      Specified by:
      calculateMeans in class BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
      Parameters:
      data - The baseline source list of generic data structures.
      Returns:
      An array tracking sequentially the calculated average for the specific mapped dimensions.

    • calculateContributions

      protected Map<String,Double> calculateContributions(smile.anomaly.IsolationForest isolationForest, double[] record, List<DataRecord> trainingData)
      Computes the algorithmic feature contribution percentage breakdown explaining how heavily each independent variable influenced a specific anomaly score.

      Calculations evaluate spatial distance impacts by substituting one variable at a time against the aggregate mean markers derived from the associated baseline training collection.

      Identifies spatial distance variances relative to the 5 baseline OHLCV variables.

      Specified by:
      calculateContributions in class BaseAnomaliesDetectionService<DataRecord>
      Parameters:
      isolationForest - The active IsolationForest dto context evaluating scores.
      record - An array containing the primitive parameters of the specific data row under review.
      trainingData - The collection of historical baseline records matching the active dto's state.
      Returns:
      A Map pairing string feature labels to their computed impact contribution weight percentages.
